virtual-scroll._comment: OrigamVirtualScroll + OrigamVirtualScrollItem component tokens — Lot 5D. Container-level component with no intrinsic visual styling; delegates layout to consuming components. BEM children: container (inner scroll wrapper), spacer (padding-top/bottom placeholders), item (each rendered virtual slot). No hex colors — purely layout and motion tokens.

item-height.$description: Default estimated item height used by the virtual engine for initial layout calculation. Overridden at runtime per item via the update:height event. 48px is a standard list row height.

scroll-padding.$description: scroll-padding applied to the scroll container, ensuring focused items are not obscured by sticky headers

transition-duration.$description: Duration for item appear/disappear transitions (fast to avoid jank during rapid scrolling)

transition-easing.$description: Easing for virtual scroll item transitions
